---
name: blog-links
description: "Find related blog posts for internal linking. Use when: adding related post links, cross-referencing content, building internal link structure."
---

# Blog Internal Links

## Procedure

1. Read the current post's topic and tags
2. Search `src/content/*.md` for posts with overlapping tags or related topics
3. Return a list of related posts with their titles and filenames
4. Suggest where to naturally insert internal links in the content
